title: MineRooms - Backrooms Blocks
description: Re-styles multiple blocks to Backrooms-themed blocks for map building.
body:
Need a Backrooms resource pack for map making or special builds? This pack is for you, while in Beta, it supports many level one blocks so far. Here is the list of blocks, with a comprehensive video showing all affected blocks coming soon:

Backrooms Wall - Stripped Birch Log/Wood
Backrooms Carpet - Yellow Wool
Backrooms Roof - Polished Diorite Stairs/Slab/Wall
Fluorescent Light - Sea Lantern

![An example of how it looks with shaders (Solas Shader)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c3b6770316a786cb332812a7f246973ca5a8c3c.png)

This resource pack is still in Alpha and bugs my occur. If you encounter any bugs or want to suggest changes for release canidates, please comment on my YouTube channel: @AlexMuseMatrix
